overview: A feature-rich offline todo app with modern glassmorphism design. Manage tasks with priorities, due dates, categories, subtasks, drag-to-reorder, filters, search, dark/light mode, and full local storage persistence.
features: Create/edit/delete tasks with title, description, priority & due date
Filter by status, priority & category + real-time search
Bulk actions: delete completed, mark all done, export JSON
